comment: Runtime application names → preset display names. Matched exactly (case-insensitive) BEFORE the auto Game-EQ falls back to fuzzy filename matching. Use this file to fix cases where an app's PipeWire application.name differs from its preset filename, or where fuzzy matching picks the wrong preset (false positives like 'Pod' matching 'Podcast'). Values are plain preset display names (no '[ASM] ' prefix — ASM is credited in the README). Per-channel keyed (only `game` populated today). Add entries via PR — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
